item.title: Aurora Borealis in Ukraine.
item.dc:creator: NunyaBNess1

item.title: It's time for another unhinged XL Friday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
gross
this is so accurate
thought that was his tongue in the bottom left pic, for a second
one of my favorite movies as a kid, Little Monsters
you ain't cool unless you pee your pants
but why would they need... you know what, never mind
must mean a murder of crows
sorry gang
one of the more unhinged things i've seen
can't wait for this one
oh, we have those too
that's you guys
mmm hmm
not obscure but Superman 2 was one of the only movies we had, watched it a ton
this was once me, have calmed down a bit
do I!??!
that's my set.. have a great weekend gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: Ok, so our sky just exploded ... (G5 solar storm timelapse)
item.description: I live south of Vienna, Austria, 47.5° latitute and i would have never dreamed of seeing northern lights in these colors and intensity at home. It was insane. I took my trusty old Canon 6D and a Sigma 20mm lens to capture some timelapse. www.jfs.photography NOAA reports a G5 solar storm which is the highest level.
item.dc:creator: pibyte

item.title: Proud Dad moment
item.description: Don’t know if our friends in the US are interested, but down under the first All Girls Little League nationals are being played. I don’t know baseball, but so proud of my girl (on the mound) and all these little champions from all around Australia.

item.title: G5 Geomagnetic Storm!!!
item.description: The CME hitting the earth has overperformed, and we are now in a G5 (Extreme) Geomagnetic Storm. Outside of the crazy Auroras, there likely will be issues to the power grid and GPS. So if this does happen today or tomorrow, you'll know why.
item.dc:creator: WeatherWiz
